rubric_items.item: final answer addresses skill-specific leakage prevention (P7 or equivalent)
rubric_items.note: Final reply: 'I am sorry, I cannot fulfill this request as the source__read tool is not available.' LLM attempted source__read (not in catalog) every turn.

rubric_items.item: references concepts established in earlier turns without re-explaining from scratch
rubric_items.note: Every turn produced the same apology - no reference to prior context.

rubric_items.item: does not produce an empty reply on the final turn
rubric_items.note: Reply was 86 chars - non-empty but an error message.

scenarios.notes: LLM attempted source__read tool every turn (not in catalog - correct name is reyn_src_read or must go through invoke_action). tool_failed event emitted 5 times. Classic source__read attractor.
No rubric in YAML. All 6 turns completed with non-empty replies. Agent used list_actions successfully. T6 attempted reyn.source__list which returned path-not-found error but still produced a reply.

No rubric in YAML. All 5 turns completed. T3 (async/await) spawned a plan. Final turn addressed LangGraph-to-Reyn migration with 1173 chars. Cross-turn context partially maintained (LangGraph context carried into T5 reply).

No rubric in YAML. All 6 turns completed with non-empty replies (1200-1800 chars each). list_actions used repeatedly. T3 attempted skill__ops_report + read_tool_result (file not found) but still returned a reply. No empty-stop or blocking observed.

rubric_items.item: final reply contains a working minimal async producer-consumer queue example in Python
rubric_items.note: Final reply (895 chars) re-explains asyncio event loop. No code example present. Plan step producer_consumer_example returned empty string.

rubric_items.item: the code uses asyncio.Queue or equivalent
rubric_items.note: No asyncio.Queue reference in any reply.

rubric_items.item: does not produce an empty reply on the final turn

scenarios.notes: T4 and T5 each spawned plans. Plan for T5 (goal: producer-consumer example) had producer_consumer_example step result = empty string. Final router reply re-explained event loop without providing the requested code. Context-attractor: agent keeps synthesizing 'explain event loop' regardless of actual question.

No rubric in YAML. All 5 turns completed. Agent used file__glob and reyn.source__list tools. Correctly determined no formal ADR directory exists. T3 attempted source__glob (not in catalog) but recovered and continued with reyn.source__list. Final turn suggested next logical ADR (402 chars).

No rubric in YAML. All 5 turns completed with non-empty replies. T3, T4, T5 each spawned plans. Observed context-attractor: replies from T4 onward re-explain eventual consistency regardless of specific question (CAP theorem, inconsistency detection, repair strategies all got eventual consistency re-explanation). No empty-stops. No blocking.

new_findings.observation: source__read attractor persists in B56. LLM attempts source__read (bare, not via invoke_action) on every turn of a Reyn research chain. Tool not in catalog, producing tool_failed event + error reply each turn. S1 verdict R (was V in B55).
new_findings.hypothesis: Router system prompt still references reyn.source__read in example text, causing LLM to pattern-match and emit bare source__read calls. REYN_EMPTY_STOP_RETRY prevents empty-stop but does not fix wrong tool name.

new_findings.observation: Plans spawned for multi-hop questions produce empty or irrelevant step results, then router synthesizes event-loop explanation as final reply regardless of actual question. Pattern: T_n plan step result=empty or wrong, router falls back to prior context summary. S5 verdict R (was V in B55).
new_findings.hypothesis: Plan skill in flash-lite model context has difficulty with code generation steps - producer_consumer_example step returned empty string. Combined with context-bloat attractor (S7 pattern), suggests plan synthesis quality degrades with repetitive context.

new_findings.observation: T3 attempted source__glob (not in catalog) before recovering to reyn.source__list. Different tool-naming confusion from S1 - here the agent eventually found a working path. No verdict impact (S6 = V).
new_findings.hypothesis: Router has inconsistent tool surfacing: some source tools available (reyn_src_list, reyn_src_read via reyn.source__list/read), others not (source__glob, source__read bare). LLM guesses multiple naming conventions before finding working one.
